title: AI Token Counter and Credits Manager

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Token Counter and Credits Manager

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/><g fill='#B7D7CD'><rect x='20' y='120' width='360' height='30'/><rect x='20' y='180' width='360' height='30'/><rect x='20' y='240' width='360' height='30'/></g><g fill='#C06C88'><text x='140' y='70' font-size='24'>Token Counters</text><text x='140' y='220' font-size='24'>Credits Manager</text></g><g fill='#411C56'><circle cx='40' cy='60' r='20'/><circle cx='340' cy='60' r='20'/><text x='20' y='40' font-size='18'>Search Bar</text><text x='360' y='40' font-size='18'>Prompt Playground</text></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Token counters should increment and decrement when clicked

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Token Counter and Credits Manager

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, token counter increments, search bar functionality, credits manager, and prompt playground.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
